first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is highly consistent. Both evaluations correctly identify the same core weaknesses: a lack of recent C++ experience relevant to industrial automation, no exposure to required standards like IEC 62443, and a mismatch in platform experience. The minor differences in wording are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce any new, unfounded critiques tied to the demographic change.
